patch.value: Daily Release run 29319995872 (2026-07-14 08:58) published pm-changelog@2026.7.14-2 to npm at 08:59:53 but the 'Create GitHub release' step's npm-existence guard read npm at 08:59:56 and got a false-negative (npm read-replica lag ~3s), failing with 'npm does not contain pm-changelog@2026.7.14-2' and skipping GitHub release creation. The publish step retries 3x but this guard did a single non-retrying npm view. Fix: poll npm up to 90s (6x15s) before declaring failure. Missing v2026.7.14-2 release recovered via workflow_dispatch (should_recover_release path).
Harden Create-GitHub-release npm guard against read-replica propagation lag
Create-GitHub-release step polls npm before failing; No false-negative release failures on freshly published -N prereleases
